mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_collection WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover_image, c.author_id, c.article_count, c.sort_order, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username AS author_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.view_count), 0) AS total_view_count FROM t_collection c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON u.id = c.author_id LEFT JOIN t_collection_article ca ON ca.collection_id = c.id AND ca.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN t_article a ON a.id = ca.article_id AND a.del_flag = 0 WHERE c.del_flag = 0
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.author_id = #{authorId}
GROUP BY c.id, u.username
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, total_view_count DESC, c.create_time DESC
ORDER BY c.title ASC ORDER BY c.title DESC
ORDER BY c.article_count ASC ORDER BY c.article_count DESC
ORDER BY c.create_time ASC ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.create_time DESC
